name: Battery Energy Density Calculator
description: Calculate the specific energy density of a battery in Wh/kg.
formulaDescription: Energy density is the ratio of stored energy to the mass of the battery.

example.explanation: A battery with 99Wh weighing 450g has an energy density of 220 Wh/kg.

faqs.question: Why is high energy density important for drones?
faqs.answer: Drones must overcome gravity to stay airborne. Higher energy density allows for longer flights with less weight, improving efficiency and payload capacity.

faqs.question: What are common LiPo energy densities?
faqs.answer: Most high-discharge LiPo batteries have densities between 150-200 Wh/kg, while high-capacity Li-ion batteries can reach 250-300 Wh/kg.

concept: Specific energy density determines how efficiently a drone can carry energy versus its own battery weight.
guideSteps: Enter the total energy stored in the battery pack (Watt-hours).
Enter the total weight of the battery pack (kilograms).
The calculator will display the energy density value.
